channel.title: DSP Guide – No Fluff, Just Fixes on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in DSP Guide – No Fluff, Just Fixes on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: Can't Find Titanium in DSP? Here's How to Get It (And Bring It Home)
item.description:
Your starter planet has no titanium.

That's not a bug. It's not bad luck. It's literally how the game works. The devs designed it this way to force you to figure out interplanetary travel.

Here's the quickest way to get titanium and why you shouldn't panic.

TL;DR: Fly to the planet next door. Mine the shiny blue rocks. Fly back with a full inventory. Build your first ILS to automate it. Done.

Step 1: Find Your Titanium Planet

Open your star map (M key). Look at the other planets in your starting system. One of them will have titanium veins. In the default cluster, your starter planet orbits the sun with two more planets — the one closer to the sun usually has titanium. Sometimes both do.

item.title: Green Science and Warpers: Stop Being Scared of Green Matrix (DSP Guide)
item.description:
You've got Yellow Science running. Titanium flowing. Everything is… fine. Then you look at Green Matrix. Three ingredients. Processors. Casimir Crystals. Electromagnetic Turbines.

And you think: "Yeah no. I'll do it later."

I get it. Every DSP player hits this wall. But here's the thing — Green Matrix unlocks Space Warpers. And Warpers turn your factory from a solar-system-only operation into a galactic empire. You want that.

TL;DR — Green Matrix needs 3 things: Processors + Casimir Crystals + EM Turbines. Scale your existing Processor line. Build a Casimir plant. That's most of the work done.

The Three Things You Need

Green Matrix = Processors + Casimir Crystals + EM Turbines

item.title: ILS Not Moving Items? Here's the 30-Second Fix (DSP Guide)
item.description:
Your ILS has power. Ships are docked. Nothing moves.

Yeah. This is the #1 “why the hell isn't this working” question in DSP. Let's fix it in 30 seconds flat.

TL;DR — Two things to check:
1. One planet must be Supply, the other Demand (not both Supply)
2. Your vessels need Space Warpers to fly. Put some in the slot.

Supply vs Demand — The 1-Minute Show

Every ILS slot has a dropdown: Supply, Demand, and Store. Half the community doesn't know these make the difference between a dead ILS and a humming factory.

item.title: Why Your DSP Power Grid Keeps Crashing (And How to Fix It)
item.description:
Everything is running. Then: darkness. Sorters moving like they're underwater. Your thermal plants flickering on and off. The death spiral.

Here's what happened and how to fix it.

TL;DR — The cascade:
Factory drains power → sorters slow down → thermal plants don't get fuel → production drops → more power loss → everything dies.
The fix: Disconnect non-essential buildings. Feed thermal plants manually. Then build more solar.

⚡ What Just Happened (The Cascade)

DSP has a nasty feedback loop that first-timers always run into:
